sources.title: Ghost Ship, Zarak, Daddy Long Legs, Secret Beyond the Door, City That Never Sleeps, Scarlet Angel

metadata.Plot: After discovering a passenger ship missing since 1962 floating adrift on the Bering Sea, salvagers claim the vessel as their own. Once they begin towing the ghost ship towards harbor, a series of bizarre ocurrences happen and the group becomes trapped inside the ship, which they soon learn is inhabited by a demonic creature.
metadata.Actors: Julianna Margulies, Gabriel Byrne, Ron Eldard
